rulings.Case Title: MELBA TYSON VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 7, 2017 line 1. PETITIONER MELBA TYSON AMENDED MOTION For Peremptory Writ Of Administrative Mandate Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on December 7, 2017 parties are to submit supplemental briefs (not to exceed 2 pages) addressing the authority of the reviewing officer to consider evidence not presented with the original request in his/her determination. Specifically, could the reviewing officer consider evidence of disability not presented with the original request in making his determination as to the extension of voucher? Each argument to be supported by citation to case, statute, regulation, etc. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: 760 BRYANT LLC VS. SANG YUO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 7, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT SANG YUO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required. Plaintiff improperly filed this action under a CUD number containing causes of action for breach of contract and declaratory relief (properly designated under CGC number). This action cannot proceed in such form. If Plaintiff wishes to proceed with all causes of action in one case, this matter will be re-designated as a general civil matter, not subject to special unlawful detainer procedures and timelines. If Plaintiff wishes to proceed with its UD cause of action separately, causes of action for breach of contract and declaratory relief will be dismissed from this action. Plaintiff to address how it wants to proceed at the hearing. = (501/LOT)
